name: Code blocks — CONFIG_NORMALIZATION_REPORT.md
what_it_solves: Index of every fenced code block in '/mnt/results/CONFIG_NORMALIZATION_REPORT.md'.
how_it_solves: Extracted with `RE_CODE_BLOCK`; each block carries language, starting line, byte count, and a 400-char preview.
why_it_exists: Reports embed code snippets that are load-bearing (e.g. class definitions, config JSON); this makes them addressable without re-reading the parent file.

blocks.preview: rootDir: oncology-coPilot  # ← directory does not exist in repo

# Root Directory: leave EMPTY in the Render dashboard (repo root).
# package.json and vite.config.js are at the repo root.
buildCommand: npm install && npm run build
staticPublishPath: ./dist
envVars:
  - key: VITE_API_ROOT
    sync: false  # ← must be set in Render dashboard UI
